creator: cem@freebsd.org
text: The primary bug has lower impact on 11 due to the specifics of the previous arc4random(3).  And the second tsleep was not introduced until after 11, unless someone MFC'ed it.  I don't know if this bug is relevant for 10 at all; random's structure changed heavily in ~2015.  (Also, are there going to be any more 10.x releases anyway?)
